name: Butlin's Pwllheli
formerNames: Butlin's Pwllheli  Pwllheli Holiday World  Starcoast World
description: Butlin's Pwllheli was a holiday camp located near Pwllheli in Wales.  The site is now used by Haven Holidays for a caravan park and has been renamed Hafan y Môr.  When originally opened in 1947, it was named Butlin's Pwllheli.
